description.overview: Known as the 'supreme gundog,' the Wirehaired Pointing Griffon excels at pointing and retrieving. Their rough coat protects them in harsh terrain.
description.history: The Wirehaired Pointing Griffon originated in Netherlands/France.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, devoted, trainable.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their harsh, wiry double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Known as the 'supreme gundog,' the Wirehaired Pointing Griffon excels at pointing and retrieving. Their rough coat protects them in harsh terrain.
